description: Style NoteEssence de Femme announces the arrival of spring with its tangy, irresistible fragrance. Recommended for upscale casual dos. Product DetailsThe fragrance has gentle, light, refreshing and cheerful accords with top notes shine of mandarin which is mixed with fresh, fruity notes. A heart introduces feminine Stephanotis flowers, whereas base notes incorporate creamy and soft amber.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize75 ml
